title: RI | Medieval Fantasy RPG
description: This modpack aims to set an, obviously, Fantasy feel to Minecraft but still making it feel a little more vanilla. Which means you can still play this with your friends to beat Minecraft with a little extra fun.
body: Welcome! This Modpack adds furniture, armors, weapons, and that little bit of a more RPG style feel to minecraft. Although it doesn't have some big storyline thatll last you weeks on end to beat, the mods in this pack were chosen to still have that vanilla way to play minecraft with that extra pizaz. You can play this by yourself, or even add in the essentials mod to play singleplayer with your friends! But do know this is mainly a Modpack created for a Medieval Fantasy Server which, in the future will have the IP and Discord linked here in the description!
